title: AI Agents in Customer Support
topic: How AI agents improve support operations

slides.title: Title
slides.html:
Operations Brief

AI Agents in Customer Support

A practical model for faster, more consistent service.
slides.css: .slide { width: 1920px; height: 1080px; background: #0f172a; color: white; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; padding: 120px 160px; } .kicker { color: #93c5fd; font-size: 34px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin-bottom: 32px; } h1 { font-size: 118px; line-height: 1.02; max-width: 1320px; margin: 0 0 36px; } p { font-size: 44px; line-height: 1.25; color: #cbd5e1; max-width: 1120px; }
slides.speaker_notes: Introduce the business outcome before showing implementation details.

slides.title: Operating Model
slides.html:
A three-layer support model

IntakeClassify requests and enrich context.
ResolutionDraft answers, execute workflows, and escalate edge cases.
LearningFeed outcomes back into policies and knowledge bases.
slides.css: .slide { width: 1920px; height: 1080px; background: #f8fafc; color: #0f172a; padding: 110px 130px; } h2 { font-size: 86px; margin: 0 0 80px; max-width: 1150px; } .grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 36px; } .grid div { min-height: 420px; border: 2px solid #dbeafe; background: white; padding: 48px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; } strong { font-size: 42px; color: #2563eb; } span { font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.35; color: #334155; }
slides.speaker_notes: Explain the layers as a system, not as isolated features.
